title: acalypha gracilis
intro: Acalypha gracilis, also known as the slender copperleaf or small copperleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acalypha gracilis include relief from fever, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule.
